info.title: Shoprocket API
info.description: The Shoprocket API. This is the private API and is under rapid development. Endpoints may change be added to and removed.  Also some endpoits are symbolic in nature such as session and voucher which at this moment in time reside in the cart end point.  By the they are promoted to the public API they will most likely be under the session voucher methods  and not the cart.  This is one example of the things you may find whilst using the private API's.  If you do not have a partner key email support@shoprocket.co.uk

get.description: Create a company.  Note this once you create a company you will be presented with a unique company id which you use to intreact with Shoprocket and a Oauthey which can be exchanged for a token to used with the Shoprocket API

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Primary email address for the company

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: Password for company account you are creating

parameters.name: companyname
parameters.description: The name of the company you are creating the account for

parameters.name: partnerkey
parameters.description: Your partner key which was issued

parameters.name: currencycode
parameters.description: Hold the currency, supported currencies can be found here https://support.shoprocket.co/docs/supported-currencies

parameters.name: live
parameters.description: Set the account you create to live or test

get.description: Allows You to Add a Product to a Company Account on the Shoprocket Platform.

parameters.name: companyid
parameters.description: The ID of company you want to add a product to

parameters.name: authkey
parameters.description: The authorisation key issued when the account was created

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the product

parameters.name: price
parameters.description: The price of the product

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: The quantity of the product you have for sale

parameters.name: externalid
parameters.description: Adds an external ID to tie to other stock control systems

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Adds any notes you have for the product

parameters.name: views
parameters.description: Adds the number of views the product has. Useful if you are porting from an existing system and do not want to start again.

parameters.name: weight
parameters.description: Weight of the product in KG's

parameters.name: strapline
parameters.description: The strapline of the product you wish to create.

parameters.name: rating
parameters.description: The current rating for the product. Useful if you are porting from an existing system and do not want to start again.

parameters.name: rating_count
parameters.description: The overall (max) rating. Useful if you are porting from an existing system and do not want to start again.

parameters.name: imagename
parameters.description: The name of the image if you want to bypass shoprockets image CDN

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The location of the image (absolute URL) if you want to bypass shoprockets image CDN

parameters.name: customfields
parameters.description: Any custom fields you want to attach to the product

parameters.name: meta
parameters.description: Sets any search able meta you want to associate with the product

get.description: Allows you to Delete a Product Attached to a Company on the Shoprocket Platform. When you delete a product, we still keep an archived copy of it. So people can still see it in past orders and you can still see it in your reporting.

parameters.name: companyid
parameters.description: The ID of company you want to add a product to

parameters.name: authkey
parameters.description: The authorisation key issued when the account was created

parameters.name: productid
parameters.description: The ID of the product you want to update

get.description: The default communication settings for your account.

parameters.description: The authorisation key issued when the account was created

parameters.name: partnerkey
parameters.description: Your partner key which was issued

parameters.name: fromname
parameters.description: The name the email is from (defaults to company name)

parameters.name: fromemail
parameters.description: The from email that your customers see when the email arrives

parameters.name: youremail
parameters.description: An internal email that can be used to cc, to make a copy of the email, or inform you of a new order

parameters.name: accountsemail
parameters.description: An internal email that allows your accounts department to receive an email

parameters.name: telephone
parameters.description: Your company's telephone number

parameters.name: mobile
parameters.description: The mobile number your customers will see when they receive a SMS confirmation

parameters.name: mobilefrom
parameters.description: The name your customers will see when they receive an SMS

get.description: Check the cache state for the company.  The cache is reset whenever anyone makes a write to the company such as changing a product price.  You should store the cache number and if it is higher the fetch the products again.

get.description: GET /cart/ordersbyemail/{email}{companyid}{locationname}
This function check the stock level for an item that has stock level options enabled ie Trousers size 36 10 in stock , size 34 8 in stock

parameters.name: productid
parameters.description: The ID of the product

parameters.name: productoptionid
parameters.description: The ID of the product option

parameters.name: selectedoption
parameters.description: The ID option the user has selected

location.description: The location the order was placed

id.description: the line ID of the order

taxamount.description: The tax amount of the item

taxrate.description: The tax rate of the item

productcount.description: The number of products the account has

totalsales.description: The number of sales the account has

totalrevenues.description: The total amount of revenue the account has

result.description: This will be a GUID that you can pass to Shoprocket to auto login your user
The number of the current cache count

orderid.description: The number of the current cache count

cache.description: The number of the current cache count

mealdealitems.description: Meal deal items for the product (array)

result.description: Result of the deletion 1 good 0 bad

quantity.description: The quantity in stock for the option

quantity.description: Hold the quantity of the product

id.description: Hold the id of the product

whositfor.description: Hold the name of the voucher

name.description: Hold the name of the product

price.description: Hold the price of the product

taxrate.description: Hold tax rate of the product

quantitywarning.description: Hold quantity warning of the product (out of stock etc)

digital.description: Hold if the product is digital or not

taxamount.description: Hold the tax amount of the product

optionstotal.description: Hold the options total of the product

itemtotal.description: Hold the total for the product

id.description: Hold the id of the picker

name.description: Hold the name of the picker

whofor.description: Hold who the picker is for

cost.description: Hold the cost of the picker

quantity.description: Hold the number of this picker item sold this session

subtotal.description: Hold the percentage to take off for the voucher

optionname.description: Hold the percentage to take off for the voucher

pickerid.description: This is an incrementing list srtating at 0 as the key and having the name of the item as the value

dealname.description: Hold the percentage to take off for the voucher

free.description: The amount require for free shipping

locationid.description: Hold the ID of the location

message.description: Hold the message for the location

name.description: Hold the name of the location

state.description: Hold the state of the location

meta.description: The meta data for attached to the product (comma seperated)

currency.description: The currency code for the product

quantity.description: The amount of stock for the product

dateadded.description: The date the product was added

lastmodified.description: The date the product was last modified

companyid.description: The company id which owns the product

externalid.description: The external id which for the product

views.description: The number of views the product has

image.description: An external image loction if you are bypassing Shoprocket's image CDN

deposit.description: The deposit amount of the product

video.description: An external link to a video of the product

billingnotes.description: The billing notes for the product

showit.description: If the product is hidden or not 1 show 0 hide

historyid.description: The id of the hostory used to see product revisions

revenue.description: The amount of revenue the product has made

justpicker.description: A boolean that will make this prduct show up just for picker items ie salad leaves

outofstock.description: A boolean that immedialty marks a product out of stock

taxrate.description: Set how much tax to charge for the product

branch.description: The ID of of your location this will make the product avaliable for just that location

hasimage.description: A boolean that tell us if the product has an image or not

keyword.description: Hold the keyword for the meta

label.description: Hold the label for the meta

id.description: Hold the id of the timeslot

startime.description: The start time of the timeslot

endtime.description: The end time of the timeslot

baseslots.description: The number of slots for each timeslot

interval.description: The interval for each time slot ie 15 minutes

usedslots.description: How many used slots in total have been used (read only set by use action)

id.description: Hold the id of the account details

name.description: The company id which owns the location

useallproducts.description: A boolean to use all product or just ones assigned to this branch

sellwhenclosed.description: Bolean that sets if to sell products or not

stripepercentage.description: The & fee to apply to the charge

srmode.description: If the account is in test or live mode

whositfor.description: use whos it for input or not
